name: The Mountain Man
description:
Suit Shield (Con)

Alignment chaotic neutral

The Mountain Man represents creatures with incredible physical power. As long as you have The Mountain Man invested, it grants you a +2 item bonus to Athletics checks to , , , or . This increases to a +3 item bonus if you are at least 17th level.

Activate 2 command, Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect You bring the might of the mountain into your body. You cast 2nd-rank or 4th-rank upon yourself. If you're at least 15th level, the duration increases to 1 hour.
